text.p: I wish to state start by congratulating you on your recent election as the Chairman of T Local govemmet government state. this has shown That the people of the State recongsim recognise your abilities to provide efficient and accountable leadership responsive to the problem of the state. I however wish to inform you about The serious problem facing poor road in the State and that the make sum vihicle the sum car and it is make cauce it is couse accident many people and death becouse road are not good and sum armed ruber pick money for pocket. that So Sir, this problem is very serious. finally Sir, I have written this letter to you becouse I am confident of your workable leadiship abilities. I believe that the solutions recommended above are workable if implement. I therefore hope you will use your good and highly respected position to help solve these problem
